assessor_raw:
BASELINE ASSESSMENT — real_world_framing_002 (Run 2)

Model performance is adequate. The hard-block architecture fails on three independent grounds: (1) 1.76 million false declines per period, concentrated in underbanked customers with no payment alternatives; (2) Regulation E dispute resolution obligations cannot be met by a system with no notification or review pathway; (3) hard block eliminates the feedback loop needed for model retraining.

Verdict: Hard-block deployment inappropriate. Soft-block with human review required.
